ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or region */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "WHO_region" TEXT /* World Health Organization region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date and time for the country data */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been vaccinated */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per 1000 people */,
  "healthcare_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the country */,
  "public_health_resources" TEXT /* Description of available public health resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_WHO_region FOREIGN KEY ("WHO_region") REFERENCES WHO_regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or region */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Total number of active cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases in the last reporting period */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths in the last reporting period */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries in the last reporting period */,
  "deaths_per_100_cases" REAL /* Ratio of deaths to confirmed cases per 100 */,
  "recovered_per_100_cases" REAL /* Ratio of recoveries to confirmed cases per 100 */,
  "deaths_per_100_recovered" REAL /* Ratio of deaths to recoveries per 100 */,
  "confirmed_last_week" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases in the previous week */,
  "one_week_change" INTEGER /* Change in confirmed cases over the last week */,
  "one_week_percent_increase" REAL /* Percentage increase in confirmed cases over the last week */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "new_active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new active cases in the last reporting period */,
  "total_vaccinations" TEXT /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccinations_per_100" REAL /* Number of vaccinations per 100 people */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per 1000 people */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_admissions" INTEGER /* Number of ICU admissions */,
  "ventilator_usage" INTEGER /* Number of ventilator usages */,
  "infection_rate" REAL /* Rate of infection */,
  "reproduction_number" REAL /* Reproduction number (R0) */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Case fatality rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "WHO_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WHO region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the WHO region */,
  "total_population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases in the region */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the region */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries in the region */,
  "total_active_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of active cases in the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that has been vaccinated */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per 1000 people */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)
